sections.paragraph:
(“justice of Jehovah”), [Zedekiah, Zidkijah], pr.n.-

(1) of a king of Judah, 600-588, b. c., to whom this name was given by Nebuchadnezzar, instead of his former name מַתַּנְיָה, 2Ki 24:17 1Ch 3:15 Jer 1:3.-(2) of a false prophet under Ahab, 1Ki 22:24 2Ch 18:10, 23 2Ch 18:23also צִדְקִיָּה 1Ki 22:11.-(3) Jer 29:21, 22 Jer 29:22.-(4) 1Ch 3:16.-(5) Jer 36:12.
